Off Calendar Jan-19-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Curtis E.A. Karnow
Clerk Danial Lemire
Tiega-Noel Varlack for plaintiff Julie Wenah
Kenneth Perri for defendant Equinox
Matter is argued in open court.
The trial has been continued to August 14, 2023.
Defendant is not opposed to continuing the expert discovery but is opposed to continuing non-expert discovery.
Plaintiff's counsel to draft an order and email to defendant's counsel to review and then email a word editable version to the Court.
The Court shall than issue the order.
